ead.archdesc:
======= RMA03808Sid Saltzman papers15-2-3808Compiled by Viktor ZhongDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections

This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Sid Saltzman papers
Saltzman, Sidney.
15-2-3808
5 cubic feet. 5 cubic feet.
1950-2009. Correspondence, Publications, Research Materials Includes papers documenting Sid Saltzman's work. Collection material in English 6854592
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Viktor Zhong
Date completed:
December 2010
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, December 2010
Date modified:
RMC Staff, June 2012
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Emeritus professor in City and Regional Planning, Cornell University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes correspondence, publications, research material on regional modeling, regional science, economic development and public policy analysis in the United States and abroad, and course material on quantitative and modeling, statistics, econometrics, input-output and social accounting matrix models, regional science and quantitative public policy analysis.
Cite As:
Sid Saltzman papers, #15-2-3808. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Economic development. Quantitative research. City planning. Regional planning. Cornell University. College of Architecture, Art, and Planning Cornell University -- : Faculty.
